scale: 0-100, honest self-assessment of the LOCAL product; not externally audited; not ERPNext parity

authSecurity.note: PBKDF2 + lockout + password policy + anti-forgery + secure cookie + session timeout + audited events. No MFA/SSO yet.

migrationsDatabase.note: Committed EF migration history + apply/SQL-script/SQL-Express scripts. SQLite portable. Not applied on a live SQL Express in this environment.

accounting.note: Double-entry GL, P&L, balance sheet, trial balance, AR/AP, cost centres; tested.

stock.note: Stock ledger, balance, valuation relief; tested.

manufacturingSkeleton.note: WorkOrder/JobCard/BOM/QualityInspection as CRUD modules; no MRP/routing engine.

hrPosEcommerceSkeleton.note: Employee/Leave/Timesheet/PosProfile/WebProduct as CRUD modules; no payroll/POS/cart engines.

workflowRbacAudit.note: Maker/checker thresholds + rejection reason + append-only audit + RolePermission matrix; tested.

uiCompleteness.note: Create/list/edit/soft-delete for masters + catalog; submit/approve/cancel for documents (immutable when posted, by design). Some bespoke pages thin.

reportsImportExport.note: GL/TB/P&L/BS/AR-AP/stock reports; CSV import with rejected-row capture. Export coverage partial.

playwright.note: 38 Playwright tests green (CRUD lifecycle, auth lockout, anti-forgery, navigation).

deployment.note: Publish + migrations + backup/restore + health + smoke + SQL-Express setup + DEPLOYMENT.md; login proven on Release EXE.

erpNextGradeParity.note: Reference-grade subset, not ERPNext breadth (separate parity file).

classification: ERP_LOCAL_PRODUCTION_READY (core local criteria met) with documented residual depth + external gates
honesty: No 100% claim. No ERPNext parity claim. No external certification claim. Manufacturing/HR/POS are skeletons; edit/delete is restricted to mutable masters by accounting design; external gates (SSO/OIDC, CA TLS, external security review, customer acceptance) remain.
